summary: All features tested successfully. Auto Vehicles feature fully functional: GET /api/auto-vehicles returns production and sales data with 6 category breakdowns (cars, trucks, buses, jeeps & pickups, tractors, 2 & 3 wheelers). Real Sector panel shows Auto Vehicles card with both Production (18.6K) and Sales (19.5K) values. Modal opens with Production/Sales toggle, stacked bar chart with all categories, and time range selectors. LSM modal correctly has inline base selector and NO 20Y time range. All regression tests pass.
passed_tests: GET /api/auto-vehicles returns 200
Response has data with production and sales blocks
Production block has latest, history, categories, mom_change_pct
Sales block has latest, history, categories, mom_change_pct
Production has all 6 categories: Cars, Trucks, Buses, Jeeps & Pickups, Tractors, 2 & 3 Wheelers
Sales has all 6 categories
Production history entries include all category values
Sales history entries include all category values
MoM change calculations are correct
Real Sector panel shows Auto Vehicles card
Auto Vehicles card shows Production value (18.6K)
Auto Vehicles card shows Sales value (19.5K)
Auto Vehicles card shows Production change (-27.46%)
Auto Vehicles card shows Sales change (-26.85%)
Auto Vehicles card shows month (February 2026)
Click Auto Vehicles card opens modal
Modal has Production/Sales toggle buttons
Modal has time range selector (1Y, 2Y, 5Y, ALL)
Modal has stacked bar chart with all 6 categories
Switching to Sales mode updates chart data
Modal close button works
LSM modal has inline base selector
LSM modal does NOT have 20Y time range (correct)
LSM modal has YTD, 1Y, 2Y, 5Y, 10Y, ALL time ranges
Regression: /api/economic returns 200
Regression: /api/lsm returns 200
Regression: /api/lsm-historical returns 200
Regression: /api/cpi-yoy returns 200
Regression: /api/cpi-mom returns 200
Regression: /api/business-environment returns 200
Regression: /api/remittances returns 200
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto Vehicles feature is fully implemented and tested. API returns production and sales data with 6 vehicle categories. UI shows card with both values in Real Sector panel, modal has Production/Sales toggle and stacked bar chart. LSM modal regression verified - has inline base selector, no 20Y time range.
